funFacts: Historically, the Children Playing Classic Board Game has captured the imagination of artists, scientists, and educators alike.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing smooth gradient shading using fine-tip gel pens.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about advanced mechanical structure and shapes while developing fine motor coordination.
